description: Style NoteCreate the right board room impression with this stacked-heeled formal shoe from bata. Bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this shoe tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this shoe that is as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!Product DetailsSquare toed semi-formal shoe with stitches at the seams of the toeboxBlack leather upper with stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded inner and tongueUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU upraised sole with a stacked heel that has horizontal groovesMaterial and CareLeatherUse a damp cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
